requirement.description: The gateway shall derive a consolidated turn activity status based on the evaluated turn indicator inputs.

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated turn activity when both indicators are inactive
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; LeftIndicator = 0; RightIndicator = 0; Monitor CAN ID 0xC8
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_con_001_all_inactive(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated turn activity when left indicator is active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_con_002_left_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated turn activity when right indicator is active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_con_003_right_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated turn activity when both indicators are active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_con_004_both_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated turn activity updates on left indicator activation
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Both indicators initially inactive
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_con_005_transition_set(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
    states = [decode_turn_active(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0 in states and 1 in states
    assert states[-1] == 1

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated turn activity clears when both indicators are deactivated
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; At least one indicator active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_con_006_transition_clear(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
    states = [decode_turn_active(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert states[-1] == 0

test_cases.title: Verify consolidated turn activity remains asserted if one indicator remains active
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Both indicators initially active
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_turn_con_007_partial_active(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5
    assert all(decode_turn_active(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)
